stories.headline: US investigators begin search of Epstein’s former ranch in New Mexico
stories.description: Search comes after the release of investigative files renewed attention to sex offender’s activities at the Zorro Ranch.

stories.headline: Iran war: What is happening on day 11 of US-Israel attacks?
stories.description: Hundreds of thousands of Iranians rally in Tehran to show their support for the new supreme leader, Mojtaba Khamenei.

stories.headline: As Israel intensifies Lebanon attacks, Hezbollah disarmament takes backseat
stories.description: Ongoing fighting means issue of Hezbollah’s disarmament likely to remain on hold, military experts and analysts say.

stories.headline: An 'epidemic' of violence: The women and girls killed by men last year
stories.description: We tracked reports and contacted police and prosecutors for a deeper look at the situation across UK.

stories.headline: Gaza food prices soar as border closures deepen shortages amid Iran war
stories.description: Families are buying whatever they can while supplies last, fearing that food available today may not be there tomorrow.
